scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts src/frontend tests/e2e
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts src/frontend tests/e2e
scripts.lint: bun run typecheck && bun run format:check:rust && cargo clippy --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.verify: bun run check:hygiene && bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run test:e2e && bun run build
scripts.test:with-services: COMPOSE_SERVICES="qdrant" bash scripts/run-with-compose-services.sh bun run test
